title: Nursery Rhyme. XCVIII. Proverbs.
content:
A sunshiny shower,
        Won't last half an hour.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XCVIII. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
